svg.title: Generic soul file vs The Orientation Letter — comparison diagram
svg.desc: Two parallel flows showing the difference between a generic soul file approach (persona, tone, rules, agent deployed) versus the Orientation Letter approach (who you are, what you're walking into, how to meet a human, agent who knows where it is)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Orientation Letter tell the agent about itself?')
sendPrompt('What does the Orientation Letter tell the agent about humanity?')
sendPrompt('How does the Orientation Letter teach agents to meet humans?')
sendPrompt('What makes the Orientation Letter different from other soul files?')
